title: astragalus hostilis
intro: Astragalus hostilis, also known as Mexican milkvetch, is a plant species belonging to the legume family, native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Astragalus hostilis include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce stress and anxiety, and support cardiovascular health. Astragalus hostilis can be prepared as a tea, capsule, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
